hero.tagline: Websites, small tools, 3D printing and a bit of electronics. Not always perfect, but I give it a go.

services.label: What I can help with
services.title: I help with what I can
services.subtitle: I am not an expert at everything, but I like to try. If there is something you need help with, feel free to ask.
services.web_desc: Simple websites and landing pages. Nothing fancy, but it works and looks decent.
services.software_desc: Need something that automates a boring task or keeps track of something? I can take a look.
services.saas_desc: I have built a couple of apps with sign-up and payments. Can help with simpler versions of that.
services.pwa_desc: Apps that work on the phone without going through an app store. Simple stuff.
services.print_desc: I have a 3D printer and can print simple things. I stick to simple models, but it works well for practical use cases.
services.pcb_desc: Simple circuit boards, Arduino stuff and similar. I can design and order simple PCBs, but nothing complex.

projects.label: Things I have made
projects.title: Own projects
projects.subtitle: Two things I have built and launched. Both still alive.
projects.losttags_desc: QR labels you attach to things you are worried about losing. If someone finds the item and scans the code, you get notified. Built because I lost my bag once.
projects.losttags_f1: Custom QR labels with optional design
projects.inventoriz_desc: An overview of what you own and where it is. Built because I could never find my stuff. Works as an app on the phone.
projects.inventoriz_f1: Scan QR codes in the browser

about.label: About me
about.title: Thorleif Jacobsen
about.body1: I am not an agency or a firm with fancy presentations. I am just someone who likes making things, and who uses AI and the internet heavily to make it happen.
about.body2: Sometimes what I make works really well, sometimes it is good enough. I am honest about what I can and cannot do, and I will say so if something is beyond what I can manage.
about.fact_experience: Been tinkering with this for 10+ years
about.val1_desc: I do not take on things I cannot handle. If something is too complex, I say so rather than faking it.
about.val2_desc: Sometimes I do not know the answer straight away, but I usually figure it out if I give it a chance.
about.val3_desc: A simple solution that works is better than a complex one nobody understands.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Hey, what can I help with?
contact.subtitle: Send me a message about what you need. I will reply as soon as I can and be honest about whether I can help or not.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.message_placeholder: Describe what you need and we will see about it.
contact.sent_sub: I will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
